selected_candidate: Reject stale Command readback status and persist an invalid reconciliation fixture.
alternatives_rejected: Only add a fixture without validation repair; rejected because stale Command status was not blocked.
Only add another in-memory unit test; rejected because node 29 requires a durable fixture.
Change Command readback generation; rejected because generation already mirrors readback status and the gap was validation.
decision: Extend closure validation, allow blocked_stale_artifact final-state packets for stale artifacts, add fixture, tests, and production-readiness assertion.
